name: Frisco Loofah Swing Bird Toy
description: A whole lot of fun is about to swing on into your feathered friend’s life with this loofah swing bird toy, from Frisco by Chewy! The loofah is great for perching, swinging, nibbling and even shredding. Each swing toy is crafted by hand, giving each one its own unique quirks and features, a true one of a kind! It even comes with a clasp and hook so that you can hang it anywhere for playdates.
